summary.note: Venue display page rebuilt as an independent read-only shell with fixed header, operator controls, stage and status bar. It uses real public competition groups/rounds/pairings, applies a provisional readability layout, supports manual pagination, pause/focus/return, and keeps live board/clock/subscription data CONTRACT_BLOCKED. Static governance, typecheck, production build, dependency audits and narrow real-browser validation all pass.

CURRENT_IMPLEMENTED: Independent VenueDisplayShell with fixed header, controls, stage and status bar
Read-only public pairing composition from confirmed repository
Group/round selection via ProductSelect with URL ownership
Display-specific round default: explicit URL, source current round, latest round, first round
Stable pairing sort by status (in-progress / completed / upcoming / other) then board number
Provisional readability layout using ResizeObserver and OD-05/OD-06 placeholders
Manual pagination via ProductPagination and PageUp/PageDown keyboard control
Single-pairing focus view with 'return to overview' and Escape handling
Focus return to original card trigger after exiting focus
Retained refresh, empty, partial failure and full failure states
Truthful '实时棋盘暂不可用' banner for contract-blocked live board/clock
APPROVED_TARGET: 1/4/multi-board grid once real board models are available
Live freshness, stale, reconnecting, disconnected and completed lifecycle surfaces once contracts close
PROHIBITED: AI, engine evaluation, notation editing, annotations, manual position
Source write-back, event management, device diagnostics
Fake clock, fake live data, mock boards
Raw px constants or a second token namespace

COR-004.title: Replace unbounded auto-fit cards with independent readable layout
changes: Replaced auto-fit grid with VenueDisplayShell + bounded stage + readability algorithm.
Cards use project tokens only; no TeachingWorkspace import.
validation: Browser: 1280x720, 1920x1080, 3840x2160, 2560x1080 and 375x667 viewports render without body scroll or Vite overlay.

COR-005.title: Display-specific round default policy
changes: Fallback: source current round, latest round, first round; invalid values are cleared.
validation: Browser: /competitions/47347/display selects '第 1 轮' automatically and renders pairings.

COR-007.title: Keep live/clock/subscription CONTRACT_BLOCKED
changes: Focus view shows '实时棋盘暂不可用' with truthful explanation; no placeholder board or clock is rendered.
validation: Browser: DOM contains no fake chess board or clock in focus view.

COR-012.title: 共享 Token 整理与原始视觉值归一
changes: All spacing, colors, borders, radii and typography use src/styles/tokens.css.
Layout algorithm constants live in a composable with OWNER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED comments, not CSS tokens.

COR-014.title: Read-only board accessibility separation
changes: Public pairing cards expose board number, both player names and result/status as text.
Focus action is a visible button, not dependent on board interaction.
validation: Browser: cards are keyboard reachable and focus view announces '实时棋盘暂不可用'.

COR-015.title: Bounded RouteShell and single scroll owner
changes: VenueDisplayShell sets height to --workspace-viewport-h and overflow: hidden.
Header, controls and status bar are fixed; stage is bounded and paginated instead of scrolling.
validation: Browser: no body scroll at 200% zoom or short viewport; content remains reachable via pagination.

COR-024.title: Last-trusted, stale, reconnect, disconnect, completion and partial failure states
changes: Status bar shows last update time and retained-refresh indicator.
Partial failure banner is shown when data exists alongside an error.
validation: Browser: status bar updates after data loads; forced error path displays ResourceState.

COR-028.title: Real-browser acceptance gate
changes: Performed route-specific narrow browser validation on /competitions/:hdid/display.
validation: Desktop and narrow viewports render non-empty stage.
Pagination, pause, focus and Escape work without console-breaking errors.

checks.routeEntry: Direct navigation to /competitions/:hdid/display loads title, controls, status bar and stage.
checks.publicData: Real public groups/rounds/pairings are fetched and displayed as cards.
checks.pagination: Pagination controls visible; PageUp/PageDown does not break the page.
checks.pause: Pause/continue toggle updates button label and status bar.
checks.focus: Card '聚焦' enters focus view; '返回总览' and Escape restore overview and return focus.
checks.blockedLive: Focus view shows '实时棋盘暂不可用' instead of placeholder board or clock.
checks.responsive: Narrow viewport renders single-column cards; desktop uses multi-column grid.

commands: pnpm run audit:prod PASS (No known vulnerabilities)

risksAndNextSteps: Live board/clock/subscription remain CONTRACT_BLOCKED; focus view currently shows truthful unavailable state instead of a real board.
OD-05/OD-06 provisional layout constants need owner confirmation and real-device acceptance before closing COR-004.
Next slice: aggregate report and final SEVEN_PAGE_FAMILY_IMPLEMENTATION_PASS verdict.
